resources.string: Consent to Data Collection and Measurement

We use measurement technologies to understand how this app performs and to improve user experience.

 With your permission, we may collect and process limited information from your device, such as:
 	• Network performance (e.g., connection speed, latency)
 	• Device and app information (e.g., model, OS version, app version)
 	• Approximate location (if you grant location permission)

 This data helps us monitor service quality, detect issues, and improve reliability.

 Partners

 We share this data with the following partner for measurement and analytics purposes:

 		• CellRebel

 This partner processes data on our behalf and does not use it to personally identify you.

 Your Choices

 	• Accept – Allow data collection for measurement and analytics
 	• Decline – No measurement data will be collected
